The '''''Maria''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]], and a sister ship of the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']], in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
After the evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and [[Ghorin]]'s treachery, ''Maria'' received the stolen cargo from Ghorin's [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Halifax]]'' and his captured [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] during [[Operation Grain Snatch]]. ''Maria'' also assisted the protection of a [[Leafar]] convoy while attacked by the Empire.<ref name="IP">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''</ref>

Alongside the ''[[Yali]]'', the ''Maria'' was one of the last Rebel starships to depart for [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. The two cruisers were attacked by Imperial frigates ''[[Fear]]'', ''[[Hate]]'', [[Fury (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Fury'']] and ''[[Spite]]'' but they both made it to hyperspace after destroying the frigates.<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''</ref>

The ''Maria'' later joined the main fleet assembling near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] for participating in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="XWA" />

Following the Battle of Endor, the ship was assigned to the [[New Republic Third Fleet]] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Verrack/Legends|Verrack]]. It destroyed [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Peccati Syn|Syn's]] [[Silooth (Star Destroyer)|''Silooth'']] during the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|Liberation of Kashyyyk]].<ref name="TEGTW" />
